questions.scenario: The app queries active checkout drafts ordered by update time. What Firestore design item should the team expect to review?

options.text: The index that supports that query shape.

questions.scenario: A missing index error appears only when a new query path runs in production. What did the release miss?

options.text: Query and index review before rollout.

questions.explanation: The index is part of the app's data access design.

questions.scenario: Which statements about indexes are healthy?

options.text: They reveal access patterns future engineers should know.
They should be reviewed with release changes.

questions.explanation: Indexes help queries; they do not replace security review.
